title: Operator loop evidence review readiness action hint
problem: Ticket-072 exposes scratch_evidence_status in plan mode, but operators must still infer when to run probe-scratch-evidence-review. Plan mode should recommend a review_gated action when reviewed scratch rows exist and no higher-priority blocker applies.
acceptance_criteria: When scratch_evidence_status.evidence_review_ready is true and plan is not blocked, next_recommended_action suggests running probe-scratch-evidence-review with review_gated gate.
Higher-priority blockers (dirty tree, audit overdue, drift, improvement drafts) still take precedence.
No scratch/graph DB writes or automated evidence review generation from plan mode.
Unit tests cover ready and not-ready action selection.
non_goals: No auto-persist or execute-safe evidence review runs.
No public export or site changes.
rollback_plan: Revert action-hint logic, tests, and runbook note.
